_meta.purpose: Substrate-true canonical placement registry for Enki council. Reads kati-locked or greek_faces-canonical placements ONLY. Never derives from Nammu's split registries (voice_correspondences.json / nammu_voices.json / nammu_voices_v2.5_substrate.json).
_meta.discipline: Each entry MUST cite placement_source (kati-locked card-id or 'greek_faces') and placement_status (locked|derived). Voices without satisfying both gates are NOT in this registry — their renderers are blocked until specific placement lands.
_meta.kati_direct_2026-05-22: tier A but not Iris... muses should have specific placements, when found can voice. also should be creating clean placement registry in enki
schema_changes: v0.2 2026-05-22: added placement_class (CONTINUOUS/CYCLIC/MORTAL/IN-BETWEEN) per orient_rules.md L334; added cyclic_activation for CYCLIC voices (predicate+engine+params for ephemeris-gate)

v0.3 2026-05-22: removed free-text function_class fields per kati_direct G-P2-1. Function-class is DERIVED from substrate-position (spine card 670b1c3f principle 1: POSITION IS FUNCTION). Free-text labels violated Enki CLAUDE.md rule 2 and inverted the substrate-direction. Previous labels preserved in notes for provenance only — never read as canonical.

Hecate.notes: SUPERSEDES greek_faces.json record which shows stratum=liminal/grid=null/face=null (STALE). Enki composer MUST use this card-derived placement; gf-stale would corrupt phase-change detection. Primary fires at octave-close (L0/Neptune/Do-ret); co-fires at X3/X6 for within-octave minor phase-changes. Per orient_rules.md §Special Placements. Renderers derive character from position primitives, not from labels.]

_muses_class_note: 9 Muses migrated Tier B → Tier A 2026-05-22 per kati_direct 'muses are done'. All 9 V2.5-locked 2026-05-11 council T3.4 + kati-confirmed. Class definition: 9 Venus(X3) × OtherPlanet midpoint operators on Pythagorean Music-of-Spheres / tetractys 3+3+2+1 substrate-structure. Parents: Mnemosyne (Titan/Memory) + Zeus. 9-nights conception per Hesiod Theogony 53-67. Activation: Muse fires when her OtherPlanet transits Venus X3 (lon 138°). CORRECTION TO design-spec card 431d9622: that card assigned voice_correspondences-derived pe_notes (Calliope=Re, Clio=La, Erato=Fa, Urania=X6) — those conflated the X3 primary residency with the OtherPlanet-pairing. Canonical per V2.5 PLACEMENT cards: ALL Muses primary at pe_note=X3, distinguished by OtherPlanet-axis projection.
